title: Understanding the Forces
text: To find the mass of the backpack, consider the forces acting on it. The spring scale measures the apparent weight, which is affected by the elevator's acceleration.

title: Apparent Weight Equation
text: The apparent weight (W') is given by the equation: $$W'=m \left(g-a\right)$$, where $$m$$ is the mass, g is the acceleration due to gravity $$(9.8$$ m/s²), and a is the acceleration of the elevator.

title: Rearranging the Equation
text: Rearrange the equation to solve for the mass (m): $$m=\frac{W'}{g-a}$$.

title: Calculate the Mass
text: Substitute the given values into the equation: $$W'=60$$ N, $$g=9.8$$ m/s², $$a=3.8$$ m/s². Calculate $$m=\frac{60}{9.8-3.8}$$.
